title: Crumbly Dutch Herbs Crumbe
description: A cozy dutch dish featuring fresh basil and other herbs that is simple to prepare with warm spices for a delightful herbal experience.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons butter, melted
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with olive oil for a heartier texture

ingredients.name: 1 small onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Use half if making a smaller batch

ingredients.name: 2 cups fresh basil leaves
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for added flavor and texture

ingredients.name: 1/8 teaspoon black pepper
ingredients.notes: For a slight kick of spice

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour and optional Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
Stir in melted butter or oil, onion, garlic, fresh basil, salt, and black pepper. Combine thoroughly until no lumps remain.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Transfer the crumb mixture onto the prepared baking sheet evenly spaced out. Use fingers to press down gently so it forms small compacted shapes resembling breadcrumbs (crumbe).
Bake in preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown on top and crisp around the edges.
Let cool slightly before serving as a snack or appetizer.
